name: 05-12-human-feedback-tavern-affordance
title: feedback: tavern communication affordance unclear
description: Record real human first-impression feedback: current UI feels like a cyberpunk page, not a communicable tavern.
scope: human UX feedback record only; no code changes
creator: lijin
notes: Recorded real human feedback: first impression does not foreground communicable tavern/NPC interaction; it reads more like a cyberpunk-styled page. Follow-up UX should make tavern doorway, NPC presence, and chat affordance primary within first 3 seconds.

meta.feedback_quote: 第一感觉并没有突出这是个可以沟通的酒馆；一进来看感觉是一个赛博朋克风的页面
recommended_followups: Rework first-screen hierarchy to foreground tavern doorway/chat affordance
Show NPC presence/greeting before abstract platform visuals
Make primary CTA use tavern/chat language
